governing_requirement: Publish a closed signed release snapshot and complete byte-verified catalog grounded in observed Git, build, runtime, contract, trust, journal, installation and rollback identities; fabricated or contradictory observations must prevent publication.

dependency_state.disposition: MF-P6-10.01 remains a hard blocker. Existing signed snapshot and byte-closure validation receive substantial credit, but publication authority and its declared prerequisite are incomplete.

prior_evidence.disposition: Accepted for requirement mapping and trusted re-sign probes because every governing source hash remains exact. Current dependency state supersedes the prior tracker snapshot.

verified_foundations: The frozen release snapshot is strict, canonical-hashed and Ed25519-signed under the producer-release role with production trust-anchor validation.

Validation requires dirty=false, the exact twelve-schema set, schema name/ID/path/version/hash relationships, all three completion profiles, a self-hashed artifact-security policy, current journal checkpoint and all six required artifact kinds.
Bundle validation resolves contained regular files, verifies raw hashes and sizes, and rejects path escape, symlink/reparse/hardlink-like paths, archive hazards, case aliases and unmanifested files.
Production validation separates fixture-only evidence from published authority and rejects fixture publication.
Three focused positive/profile-policy/byte-closure tests pass and Ruff reports no issues; all governing hashes match the accepted audit.

current_state_probes.gap: The frozen snapshot cannot select and bind exactly one native_venv or container provenance branch.

current_state_probes.basis: Accepted 2026-07-18 probes plus exact governing-source hashes

confirmed_gaps: No production publisher observes canonical repository identity, exact HEAD/tree and actual porcelain including untracked files before issuing a decision.
No typed runtime provenance selects exactly one native_venv or container branch and binds the required interpreter/environment/hardware or immutable image/config/runtime digests.
Installer, install manifest, verification workflow, rollback command and rollback verification evidence are not cataloged paths resolved to actual bytes and structured execution identities.
Trusted key registry, rotation/revocation policy and signed-journal checkpoint evidence are declared but not closed over their complete underlying bytes.
No production command materializes the exact release root, regenerates inventories/OpenAPI deterministically, emits signed publication evidence and denies drift with closed ordered reasons.
MF-P6-09.07 has not published/adopted the required executable crosswalk identity.

implementation_packet.path_state: All five additive paths remain absent and clean. Frozen v1 and candidate files are read-only; validation.py remains part of the preserved MF-P6-08.05 dirty scope.
implementation_packet.next_action: Hold until MF-P6-09.07 is implemented/adopted and exact-project worker routing is qualified; do not dispatch or duplicate while worker lanes remain disabled.

claim_boundary: This audit credits the signed frozen snapshot and strong byte-closed validation only. It does not publish a production release, observe a clean Git/runtime/build state, prove reproducible installation or rollback, complete MF-P6-09.07, or complete MF-P6-10.01.
